title: Simultaneous Equations: Elimination & Substitution
summary: Solve two equations with two unknowns using elimination (SSS rule) and substitution, including line-meets-curve problems.

title: Recurring Decimals → Exact Fractions
summary: How to convert recurring decimals into exact fractions using algebra — covers pure recurring and mixed cases.

title: Upper & Lower Bounds
summary: Finding upper and lower bounds from rounded values, writing error intervals, and using bounds in perimeter, area, speed, difference and division problems.
